series_metadata.series_description: Includes a listing of every officer employed at particular agency during year, training completion reports, drafts of these documents. Used to report an accurate count of officers and officers compliance with CPT requirements. (ORC 109.761, 109.803, and OAC 109:2-18) (There will only be CPT documentation when/if the program was funded for any given year)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: or documents and/or data saved electronically ; Electronic
